hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const a=i.toolArgs||'';const n=i.toolName||'';if(/gh\s+(pr|issue)\s+(create|comment|review|edit|merge|close)/.test(a)||/github/i.test(n))process.stderr.write('Include AI-generated content disclosure (> [!NOTE]) per copilot-instructions.md\n')}catch{}})"

PreToolUse.description: Remind about AI disclosure when posting to GitHub via gh CLI or MCP tools
